report_name: Microsoft Pushes Mandatory Secure Boot Update as 2011 Certificates Expire

malware.name: BlackLotus
malware.description: A UEFI bootkit mentioned as a type of advanced threat that the new Secure Boot certificate update is designed to harden systems against.

vulnerabilities.name: Expiring 2011 Secure Boot Certificate
vulnerabilities.description: The 'Windows PC-OEM-Production-2011' certificate used for Secure Boot is set to expire starting in June 2026. Systems that fail to apply the update with the new 2023 certificate may be unable to validate new boot components, leaving them exposed to future boot-level exploits from threats like the BlackLotus bootkit.

indicators.name: Secure Boot Certificate Update Verification Hunt
indicators.pattern:
title: Secure Boot Certificate Update Verification Hunt
id: 9c5b1f3a-4d8e-4b1c-8a7f-9e2d3c4b5a6d
status: experimental
description: >
  This rule is intended for hunting and compliance verification. It identifies access to the Secure Boot control registry key. This key should be monitored after the April 2026 updates to verify the presence of new 2023 certificates, indicating a successful Secure Boot DB and KEK refresh. Systems where the update has failed may be vulnerable to future boot-level attacks.
references:
  - https://www.malwarebytes.com/blog/news/2026/05/your-windows-pc-has-a-security-deadline-in-june-2026
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-29
tags:
  - attack.t1542.001
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate system queries to this key during boot or by security software. This rule is for hunting, not for high-fidelity alerting.
level: informational
logsource:
  category: registry_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetObject|endswith: '\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecureBoot'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: A hunting rule to identify systems that may not have successfully updated their Secure Boot certificates by checking for activity related to the HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecureBoot registry key.

relationships.source_name: Secure Boot Certificate Update Verification Hunt
